_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to show where things are in places we know.

_source.w: We are learning to show where things are in places we know.
y: Knowing where things are helps us feel confident in our spaces.
Describing position is the beginning of learning about maps and directions.
Understanding where things are helps us communicate with others.
eg: Pointing to where the door is in our classroom.
Showing someone where the toy box is.
Placing a toy on top of, under or next to something.
Walking to a spot in the room when asked.
Telling a friend where the pencils are kept.
Finding a favourite place in the playground.
